name: Withanolides
mechanism_summary: Steroidal lactones associated with adaptogenic and cortisol-modulating activity.

name: Curcuminoids
mechanism_summary: Polyphenols associated with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activity.

name: Gingerols
mechanism_summary: Pungent phenolic compounds associated with anti-nausea and anti-inflammatory activity.

name: Apigenin
mechanism_summary: Flavonoid associated with mild sedative and GABA-modulating activity.

name: Valerenic acid
mechanism_summary: Sesquiterpene associated with GABA-modulating, sleep-supportive activity.

name: Menthol
mechanism_summary: Cyclic monoterpenoid associated with smooth-muscle relaxation in the digestive tract.

name: Silymarin
mechanism_summary: Flavonolignan complex associated with hepatoprotective and antioxidant activity.

name: Anthocyanins
mechanism_summary: Pigmented flavonoids associated with antioxidant and immune-supportive activity.

name: Alkylamides
mechanism_summary: Lipophilic compounds associated with short-term immune modulation.

name: Flavone glycosides
mechanism_summary: Flavonoid glycosides associated with antioxidant and microcirculatory support.

name: Eugenol
mechanism_summary: Phenylpropanoid associated with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activity.

name: Glycyrrhizin
mechanism_summary: Triterpenoid saponin associated with anti-inflammatory, mucosa-soothing activity.

name: Chlorogenic acid
mechanism_summary: Polyphenol associated with antioxidant and metabolic support activity.

name: Taraxasterol
mechanism_summary: Triterpene associated with mild diuretic and anti-inflammatory activity.

name: Oligomeric proanthocyanidins
mechanism_summary: Condensed tannins associated with cardiovascular antioxidant support.

name: Macamides
mechanism_summary: Fatty acid amides unique to maca, associated with energy and hormonal balance support.

name: Rosavins
mechanism_summary: Phenylpropanoid glycosides associated with adaptogenic, stress-modulating activity.

name: Harman alkaloids
mechanism_summary: Indole alkaloids associated with mild sedative, anxiolytic activity.

name: Parthenolide
mechanism_summary: Sesquiterpene lactone associated with prostaglandin-synthesis inhibition and reduced vascular smooth-muscle contraction, proposed mechanisms in migraine prevention.

name: Viopudial
mechanism_summary: Compound isolated from Viburnum bark associated with smooth-muscle antispasmodic activity in isolated-tissue studies; human clinical evidence is lacking.

name: Agnuside
mechanism_summary: Iridoid glycoside associated with dopaminergic activity affecting prolactin levels, proposed mechanism behind Vitex's hormonal-balance effects.

name: Arabinoxylan
mechanism_summary: Gel-forming soluble fiber associated with increased stool water content and bulk.

name: Boswellic acids
mechanism_summary: Pentacyclic triterpenes associated with 5-lipoxygenase inhibition and reduced leukotriene-mediated inflammation.

name: Bacosides
mechanism_summary: Triterpenoid saponins associated with modulation of acetylcholine release and choline acetylase activity.

name: Tinosporaside
mechanism_summary: Diterpenoid glycoside associated with the immune-modulating and anti-inflammatory activity of Tinospora cordifolia.

name: Gallic acid derivatives
mechanism_summary: Polyphenolic tannins associated with antioxidant activity and lipid-biomarker support.

name: Nimbin
mechanism_summary: Limonoid associated with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activity in topical use.

name: 4-Hydroxyisoleucine
mechanism_summary: Unusual amino acid unique to fenugreek associated with enhanced peripheral insulin action.

name: Asiaticoside
mechanism_summary: Triterpenoid saponin associated with collagen synthesis and wound-healing activity.

name: Shatavarin
mechanism_summary: Steroidal saponin with estrogen-receptor affinity, proposed mechanism behind Shatavari's hormonal-balance effects.

name: Guggulsterone
mechanism_summary: Plant sterol that antagonizes nuclear hormone receptors involved in cholesterol metabolism; also affects thyroid hormone synthesis.

name: Arjunolic acid
mechanism_summary: Triterpene glycoside associated with cardioprotective and antioxidant activity.

name: Punarnavine
mechanism_summary: Alkaloid associated with diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and hepatoprotective activity.

name: Astragalosides
mechanism_summary: Cycloartane triterpene glycosides associated with immune-cell modulation and anti-inflammatory activity.

name: Ginsenosides
mechanism_summary: Steroidal saponins unique to Panax species associated with antioxidant and central-nervous-system-modulating activity.

name: Schisandrins
mechanism_summary: Dibenzocyclooctadiene lignans associated with antioxidant and hepatoprotective activity.

name: Ganoderic acids
mechanism_summary: Triterpenes associated with GABAergic modulation and sleep regulation, plus immune-cell enhancement.

name: Emodin
mechanism_summary: Anthraquinone identified as a likely contributor to Polygonum multiflorum's documented hepatotoxicity.

name: Ligustilide
mechanism_summary: Phthalide compound associated with antispasmodic and mild anticoagulant activity.

name: Zeaxanthin
mechanism_summary: Carotenoid that accumulates in retinal tissue, associated with antioxidant activity and blue-light filtering.

name: Cordycepin
mechanism_summary: Nucleoside analogue associated with improved exercise capacity and respiratory function.

name: Pachymic acid
mechanism_summary: Triterpenoid associated with diuretic and anti-inflammatory activity.

name: Saikosaponins
mechanism_summary: Triterpenoid saponins associated with Bupleurum's traditional stress-related and anti-inflammatory effects; also implicated in documented cases of liver toxicity.
